zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde von Meissen於0990年出生在德國薩辛德累斯頓時，她的父親Ekkehard I. Markgraf von Meißen35歲，母親Schwanhilde von Sachsen36歲。她於大約1016年與Dietrich II of Wettin結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1040年2月2日在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Meissen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Meissen was born in 0990, in Dresden, Saxony, Germany, her father, Ekkehard I. Markgraf von Meißen, was 35 and her mother, Schwanhilde von Sachsen, was 36. She married Dietrich II of Wettin about 1016. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 February 1040, in Kreis Meißen, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde von Meissen est née en 0990, à Dresden, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Ekkehard I. Markgraf von Meißen, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Schwanhilde von Sachsen, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Dietrich II of Wettin environ 1016. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1040, à Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde von Meissen 0990 in Dresden, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ekkehard I. Markgraf von Meißen 35 und ihre Mutter Schwanhilde von Sachsen 36. Sie hat um 1016 Dietrich II of Wettin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1040 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland.

Markgraf von Meißen, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Schwanhilde von Sachsen, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Dietrich II of Wettin circa 1016. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 febbraio 1040, nel Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Meissen(이)가 0990년 독일 작센 드레즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ekkehard I. Markgraf von Meißen(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Schwanhilde von Sachsen(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1016년 Dietrich II of Wettin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1040년 2월 2일 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Dietrich II of Wettin aproximadamente 1016. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1040, em Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Meissen родилась в 0990 г. в местности дресден, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Ekkehard I. Markgraf von Meißen было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Schwanhilde von Sachsen, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dietrich II of Wettin около 1016 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 февраля 1040 г. в местности крис миssен, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con Dietrich II of Wettin aproximadamente 1016. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1040, en Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 50 años.
